title: Iron
summary: Iron, now positioned as a MoonPay company, builds stablecoin banking and payment APIs for PSPs, fintechs, wallets, and treasuries. Arcium includes it in ecosystem coverage, but the public Iron materials I reviewed do not document a specific Arcium-powered module.
description:
Iron describes its product as infrastructure and APIs for modern stablecoin-powered payment experiences. The official positioning is oriented toward payment service providers, fintechs, wallets, and treasury teams rather than retail-facing wallet UX.

Arcium includes Iron in its encrypted payments ecosystem coverage. That supports Atlas inclusion, but I did not find a current Iron page that explains a specific Arcium-powered workflow or privacy module.

bodySections.title: Platform_Surface
bodySections.body: Iron's public materials are framed around embedded financial infrastructure: banking, payment APIs, treasury-facing stablecoin flows, and enterprise operator tooling. That makes it relevant to Atlas where shielded accounting or private payments infrastructure is concerned.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Iron among payments ecosystem partners. That is enough to keep it in Atlas as ecosystem coverage, but not enough to present it as a confirmed Arcium integration from current public documentation.

statusNote: Arcium includes Iron in its encrypted payments ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current Iron implementation page naming a specific Arcium-powered feature.

sources.label: Iron Website
sources.note: Official site for Iron's stablecoin banking and payments infrastructure.

sources.note: Official documentation for Iron's product stack.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
